21402.Name: Special Attack Healing
21402.Desc: Healing component of the Special Attack skill

21411.Name: Nature Shield
21411.Desc:
Nature Shield applied from Wild Bloom.
Restores HP when hit

21412.Name: Fast Growth (Growth Arcane)
21412.Desc: Growth Arcane Increases MATK and Reduces CD

21422.Name: Nature Ward
21422.Desc: Nature Shield applied from Nature Ward

21426.Name: Attack Healing Cooldown
21426.Desc: Cooldown before Attacks can perform healing again

55222.Name: Photon Reforge Ready
55222.Desc: Photon Energy is at the limit, ready to activate Photon Reforge

55226.Name: Physical Damage Immunity
55226.Desc: Granted immunity to Attack Damage for a limited time

55229.Name: Bow - Allow Photon Energy Gain
55229.Desc: Allows gaining Photon Energy class resource

55231.Name: Explosive Arrow (Charges)
55231.Desc: Counting charges for Explosive Arrow from Blast Shot

55232.Name: Explosive Arrow (Charges)
55232.Desc: Charge count for Explosive Arrow from Blast Shot

55233.Name: Explosive Arrow (Explosion)
55233.Desc: Charge limit or timer of the Explosive Arrow was reached

55237.Name: Marksman Second Resource Unlocked
55237.Desc: Access to the secondary class resource has been granted

55302.Name: Healing Beat
55302.Desc:
Play a tune that heals the caster and the nearby ally with the lowest HP.
Healing scales with the caster's MATK plus 3% of target's Max HP

55303.Name: Fivefold Crescendo - Seek Target
55303.Desc: Target selection component of Fivefold Crescendo

55315.Name: Beat Performer Ultimate (Shield)
55315.Desc: Shield that decays over time from Rock the Stage or Infinite Rhapsody

55326.Name: Rhapsody of Flame: Fire Bonus
55326.Desc: While standing within the graffiti, the caster gains 10% Fire Bonus

55328.Name: Fivefold Crescendo - Doubled
55328.Desc: Doubles the healing instances of Fivefold Crescendo from Center Stage

55334.Name: Harmonic Anthem - Doubled
55334.Desc: Doubles the damage of Harmonic Anthem from Center Stage

55335.Name: Passion Burst - Instant Max Form
55335.Desc: Allows instant max form of Passion Burst from Center Stage

55337.Name: Heroic Melody Fast Fierce Strike
55337.Desc: Halves the time needed to trigger Fierce Strike for Heroic Melody from Center Stage

55340.Name: Rhapsody of Flame: Shape Selector
55340.Desc: Decides what Shape the Graffiti will spawn in

55346.Name: Beat Performer Ultimate (Max Heal)
55346.Desc: Max heal from Ultimate skill Rock the Stage or Infinite Rhapsody

55348.Name: Center Stage MATK Buff
55348.Desc: Increases your MATK for a period of time

55349.Name: Fierce Strike - Harmonic Anthem Charge
55349.Desc: Instantly give a charge to Harmonic Anthem

55350.Name: Concert Circuit Increase Healing and DMG
55350.Desc: Each healed ally increases healing by 6% up to 39%, and each hit enemy increases DMG by 6% up to 30%

55354.Name: Peaceful Tune
55354.Desc: Whenever DMG is dealt, restores HP equal to 20% of the DMG dealt, distributed evenly among up to 5 allies

55355.Name: Healing of Stillness
55355.Desc: If you deal no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of your Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies

55395.Name: Heroic Melody Conversion Boost
55395.Desc: Heroic Melody's conversion rate boost for Peaceful Tune Conversion +50%

620301.Name: Phantom Dash - First Tier Recovery
620301.Desc: Recovers a large amount of Stamina

620501.Name: Phantom Dash - Second Tier Recovery
620501.Desc: Recovers a small amount of Stamina

882576.Name: Deploy Pulse Fountain
882576.Desc: Place a Pulse Fountain that launches players into the air

882811.Name: Dagger of Execution - Warning
882811.Desc: Selects a target to execute at the end of the timer if not protected

882851.Name: Dagger of Execution - Force-Kill
882851.Desc: Forcefully kills the marked target if not protected

2202040.Name: Inspiration (Talent)
2202040.Desc: Applies Inspiration to yourself and allies within 30 meters

2202041.Name: Inspiration
2202041.Desc: Grants the blessed target 100 Intellect, Strength, Agility, and Endurance, as well as 1.5% Crit, Haste, Luck, Mastery, and Versatility

2202050.Name: Regen Bud (Talent)
2202050.Desc: Casting a Special Attack grants 1 Regen Bud

2202080.Name: Arcane of Green
2202080.Desc: When Feral Seed deal DMG, it increases the DMG dealt by Infusion, Wild Bloom, Stag Charge in the next 10s by 20%

2202090.Name: Healing Breath
2202090.Desc: When a Special Attack, Expertise Skill, or Ultimate generates Healing, there is a chance to trigger Healing Chain

2202091.Name: Healing Chain
2202091.Desc: Healing Chain generated from Healing Breath Talent

2202100.Name: Wild Blessing
2202100.Desc: Wild Bloom now holds up to 2 charges. Wild Bloom's Energy cost -15%

2202110.Name: Smite Spec
2202110.Desc: Further enhances the ability to use Wild Bloom. Wild Bloom, Regen Pulse, and Nature Ward grant Symbiotic Mark to allies

2202120.Name: Nature Shield (Talent)
2202120.Desc:
When Wild Bloom heals a target, it also applies Nature Shield to them.
Targets with Nature Shield restore HP when hit, with the amount equal to 10% of your ATK

2202121.Name: Nature Shield (HP Regen)
2202121.Desc:
Targets with Nature Shield restore HP when hit, with the amount equal to 10% of your ATK.
This can occur up to once per second

2202130.Name: Double Infusion
2202130.Desc: After casting Stag Charge, the number of channels for the next Infusion +100%

2202140.Name: Final Bloomwheel
2202140.Desc: When Wild Bloom deals DMG, reduces the remaining CD of Infusion by 1s. If the DMG triggers a Lucky Strike, the Resistance becomes 3s

2202160.Name: Verdant Root
2202160.Desc:
While in battle state, standing still for 2s creates a Grass Domain.
Grass Domain: While inside, your haste +10%. Upon exiting, your Movement Speed +50% and Grass Domain disappears

2202170.Name: Full Bloom
2202170.Desc: Casting Life Bloom grants a fixed 50% chance to reduce the CD of Blossom Charge and Regen Pulse by 2s

2202180.Name: Healing Infusion (Talent)
2202180.Desc: Every 5 uses of Life Bloom enhances the next direct healing Expertise Skill by 100%

2202200.Name: Verdant Duet (Talent)
2202200.Desc: Life Bloom has a fixed 20% chance to heal 1 additional time

2202210.Name: Floral Whisper
2202210.Desc: Healing Expertise generate 20% more healing, but healing from Life Bloom -50%

2202220.Name: Lifeforce Extension
2202220.Desc:
Increases the Healing of Healing Chain by 10%. For every 7% Mastery, Healing Chain jumps 1 additional time.
Healing Chain restores 1% of an ally's Max HP with each tick

2202230.Name: Nourish Essence
2202230.Desc: When Life Bloom generates healing, 50% chance to apply Nourish

2202240.Name: Endless Blossom
2202240.Desc: When casting Blossom Charge, Grove Wish, or Regen Pulse, 20% chance that the next cast of Life Bloom within 5s consumes no Energy

2202250.Name: Stag Charge (Talent)
2202250.Desc:
After triggering a total of 10 Nourishing Seeds or Wild Seeds, Wild Bloom evolves into Stag Charge.
Casting Stag Charge instantly grants 3 Regen Buds

2202260.Name: Wings of Revival
2202260.Desc:
When an ally within 20 meters takes DMG exceeding 30% of their HP, Revival triggers, which can affect the same target up to once ever 45s.
Revival: Restores HP equal to 50% of the DMG taken over 5s

2202261.Name: Wings of Revival (Tracking)
2202261.Desc:
When an ally within 20 meters takes DMG exceeding 30% of their HP, Revival triggers, which can affect the same target up to once ever 45s.
Revival: Restores HP equal to 50% of the DMG taken over 5s

2202270.Name: Natural Bloom
2202270.Desc: When healing an ally with lower than 30% HP, Natural Bloom triggers, instantly restoring HP equal to 200% ATK to them

2202280.Name: Healing Pulse
2202280.Desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you are engaged with is defeated, generates a Healing Pulse

2202290.Name: Gift of Life
2202290.Desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you are engaged with is defeated, generates a Healing Orb

2202300.Name: Bud Acquisition
2202300.Desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you are engaged with is defeated, generates an Engram Orb, which grants 1 Regen Bud upon pickup

2202310.Name: Defensive Blessing
2202310.Desc: Inspiration provides the target with an additional 380 Armor

2202311.Name: Nourishing Seed
2202311.Desc: Consumed Regen Buds to throw a Nourishing Seed

2202320.Name: Flourish
2202320.Desc: When Infusion, Feral Seed, or Wild Bloom deals DMG, 30% chance to reduce the CD of the Ultimate by 1s, once per second

2202330.Name: Flowers Ascension
2202330.Desc: When Wild Seed deals DMG or Nourishing Seed generates healing, you gain a 10% Forest DMG bonus for the next 8s

2202340.Name: Lifebind Spec
2202340.Desc:
Replace Special Attack with Life Bloom and enhances the skill.
Life Bloom generates 20% more healing. Casting Life Bloom grants 1 additional Regen Bud

2202360.Name: Thorn (Talent)
2202360.Desc: When Wild Seed hits a target, it inflicts Thorn on them. Verdant DMG dealt by players to targets with Thorn +20%

2202380.Name: Verdant Blessing
2202380.Desc:
When HP of an ally with Inspiration drops below 20%, Blessing triggers.
Blessing: Grants a Nature Shield and reduces the DMG taken by 35% for 8s, once every 60s

2202400.Name: Dancing Seed
2202400.Desc:
When a DMG-type Expertise Skill triggers Lucky Strike, next Wild Seed launches 1 more projectile.
Every 5 Nourishing Seeds thrown, next throws 1 more projectile

2202410.Name: Energy Surge
2202410.Desc: Every 2% haste provides 1% energy natural recovery efficiency

2202420.Name: Regeneration Bud
2202420.Desc: When dealing damage with Basic Attacks, 10% chance to gain 1 Regen Bud

2202440.Name: Shelter
2202440.Desc: Within 5s after Casting Infusion, the damage absorption of the Nature Shield added by Wild Bloom or Nature Ward is doubled

2202450.Name: Pulse Breath
2202450.Desc: If equipped with Regen Pulse, Nature Ward and Ultimate will trigger Regen Pulse when their CDs are complete

2202460.Name: Feral Seed Symbiosis
2202460.Desc: When active Symbiotic Marks reach 5 or more, Feral Seed and Wild Seed DMG increases by 100%

2202470.Name: Wild Protection
2202470.Desc:
The charge count of Nature Ward +1.

2202480.Name: Wide-area Thorns

2202490.Desc: Infusion and Stag Charge deal double DMG to Thorned targets, but the healing conversion of both is halved

2202510.Desc: Each use or trigger of Regen Pulse reduces the CD of Nature Ward by 2s

2202520.Desc:
Regen Pulse returns to your position after it reaches the max distance.

2202530.Name: Swift Bud

2202540.Name: Breath of Symbiosis
2202540.Desc: Symbiotic Mark enhances Healing by 2%. Each 5% Mastery enhances Healing by 1%

2202550.Name: Symbiosis Extension

2202560.Desc:
When dealing DMG, Infusion grants 1 stack of Pulse Echo.
Pulse Echo: Increases DMG dealt of Regen Pulse by 20%, which lasts 12s and stacks up to 5 times

2202570.Name: Luck Damage
2202570.Desc: Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier +5%. Every 1% Luck grants 1% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier

2202580.Name: Verdant Impact
2202580.Desc: For every 20 stacks of Pulse Echo gained, the next actively cast Regen Pulse triggers a Blossom Charge at both the nearest enemy and the Ally with lowest HP

2202590.Name: Wild Luck
2202590.Desc: When Wild Bloom or Regen Pulse deal DMG, grants a chance to gain 1 REgen Bud. If the target is affected by Thorn, doubles the chance

2202600.Name: Verdant Nourishment
2202600.Desc:
If you're affected with Nourish, reduces all DMG taken by 10%.
If the targets are affected by Nourish, enhances their Healing Received from yourself by 5%

2202620.Name: Life Bloom
2202620.Desc: Using Blossom Charge enhances the next Life Bloom, skipping the cast and increasing the Healing by 50%

2202630.Name: Vitality (Talent)

2202640.Name: Flourishing Progress

2202660.Name: Energy Arcane

2202670.Name: Transcendence (Talent)

2202680.Name: Flourishing Flower
2202680.Desc: Within Grass Domain, Flower Stalk appear 50% earlier

2202690.Name: Tricolor Revelation

Consumes Moonlight Solace to launch Flower Dance - Tricolor Revelation.

Shield applied from Flower Time Dance's Flower Stalk Moonlight Solace.
Also reduces damage taken by 10%

2202711.Name: Bud to Blossom (Tracking)
2202711.Desc: When a Flower Stalk appears, grants 1 Regen Bud every 2s for 10s

2202720.Name: Inspire and Strength
2202720.Desc: Inspiration grants 100 bonus Intellect, Strength, Agility, and Endurance

2202730.Name: Energy Expansion
2202730.Desc: Increases Max Energy by 20. Using Blossom Charge restores 30% lost Energy

2202740.Name: Rescue
2202740.Desc: Healing Expertise restores 25% more HP to the targets with HP below 50%

2202750.Name: Instant Bloom
2202750.Desc: Every 5 uses of Life Bloom accelerates the using of Grove Wish or Regen Pulse by 100% and increases their Healing by 50% in 15s

2203012.Name: Photon Limit - Decreased 20
2203012.Desc: Decreases Max Photon Energy by 20, reducing the duration of Photon Refroge

2203030.Name: Vulnerable Strike
2203030.Desc: Dealing DMG grants a chance to apply Vulnerability to the enemy

2203040.Name: Wolf Pact
2203040.Desc: Tames a Wild Wolf to fight alongside you

2203050.Name: Psychic Surge
2203050.Desc: For every 15 Special Attacks cast, Photon Energy granted by the next Arrow Rain +100%

2203060.Name: Battle Howl
2203060.Desc: While Wildcall is active, the Wild Wolf is bound to deal Crit DMG on hit

2203070.Name: Direwolf's Hunger
2203070.Desc: When the Wild Wolf deals Crit DMG, you and your Beast gain Haste

2203080.Name: Meditation
2203080.Desc: While in Photon Reforge, Photon Energy drain per second is reduced from 25 to 20, allowing the effect to last longer

2203090.Name: Phantom Wolfstrike

2203100.Desc: Wild Wolf's Coordinated Attack has a 50% chance to inflict Bleed

2203110.Name: Demon Wolf Twin
2203110.Desc: When Storm Arrow deals DMG in battle, it has a chance to summon a Wild Wolf

2203120.Desc: While Photon Reforge is active, the Wild Wolf's Coordinated Attack nullifies the target's Armor

2203130.Name: Twin Arrows
2203130.Desc:
Luminary Bolt additionally causes a Photon Explosion, dealing Attack Damage equal to 1,500% ATK.
 Also knocks targets airborne, increasing DMG you deal to them by 5% for 10s

2203140.Name: Tracer Arrows
2203140.Desc: While Photon Reforge is active, for each Companion on the field, Storm Arrow fires 1 extra Lightseeker Arrow

2203150.Name: Radiant Spirit
2203150.Desc: Extends the duration of Focus by 3s

2203160.Name: Swift
2203160.Desc: Applies Swiftness to the Falcon when casting Lightning Strike

2203180.Name: Falcon Raid
2203180.Desc: For every 3 instances of Crit DMG dealt by Special Attacks, the Falcon instantly launches Lightning Strike

2203182.Name: Falcon Raid - Lightning Strike
2203182.Desc: Deals Attack Damage equal to 350% ATK to the enemy

2203190.Name: Meteor
2203190.Desc:
When the Falcon strikes, grants you a chance to gain 1 stack of Weak Point Aim.
Using Quadraflare leaves behind a Radiance Rift midair

2203200.Name: Piercing Shot
2203200.Desc: Increases the Crit of Double Arrow and Quadraflare by 7%

2203210.Name: Falcon's Heart
2203210.Desc: The Falcon ignores 30% of the target's Armor

2203220.Name: Lightfall
2203220.Desc:
Each 1% Crit Rate increases Crit DMG by 0.3%.
When Double Arrow or Quadraflare deal Crit DMG, 2 Photon Energy is restored

2203260.Name: Wildpack Spec
2203260.Desc: Further enhances Storm Arrow and the Wild Wolf's power

2203270.Name: Arrow Barrage
2203270.Desc: Basic Attacks have a chance to fire one arrow at up to 3 enemies near the target

2203280.Name: Sundering Arrow
2203280.Desc: Basic Attacks have a chance to trigger Split Arrow, once per second

2203290.Name: Falconry Spec
2203290.Desc: Replaces Storm Arrow with Double Arrow

2203320.Name: Rapid Shot
2203320.Desc: Every 5% Haste provides an additional 1% attack speed

2203230.Name: Focused Shot
2203230.Desc: Every target hit grants 1% Light DMG bonus. The bonus lasts 3s and can layer up to 4 times

2203240.Name: Valiant Heart
2203240.Desc: Companions deal 15% more DMG to Elites or stronger enemies

2203250.Name: Overcharge
2203250.Desc: When Basic Attacks deal DMG, there is a chance to instantly grant Special Attack 1 charge

2203300.Name: Wolf Dancer
2203300.Desc: After you use Arrow Rain, the Wild Wolf performs Tail Sweep until Arrow Rain ends. Tail Sweep is bound to deal Crit DMG and inflict Bleed

2203310.Name: Explosive Arrow (Talent)
2203310.Desc: When a Basic Attack or Special Attack deals DMG, it has a fixed 10% chance to fire an Explosive Arrow, once every 3 seconds

2203340.Name: Dexterity
2203340.Desc: When Agility reaches 500 points, attack speed +5%

2203360.Name: Wolf Sharp Strike
2203360.Desc: In the state of Photon Reforge, Wolf Crit DMG increased

2203370.Name: Beast Tidal Power
2203370.Desc:
Increases Light Bonus by 3%.
5s after casting Torrent Volley or Lumi Torrent, increases Light Bonus by 10%

2203380.Name: Arrow Rain Acceleration
2203380.Desc: Each time you summon 1 Wolf or Phantom Wolf, the remaining CD of Arrow Rain is reduced

2203390.Name: Life Hunt
2203390.Desc: For each additional Bleed effect on the target, Wolf deals +3% damage to it

2203400.Name: Wolf Fang Pact
2203400.Desc: Wild Wolf's Coordinated Attack reduces the remaining CD of Storm Arrow by 1 second

2203410.Name: Light and Shadow Drain
2203410.Desc: Lightseeker Arrow has a chance to apply Bleed to the target

2203420.Name: Wolf Evolution
2203420.Desc: Wild Wolf evolves into its Adult Form, increases DMG by 30% and DMG Range by 50%

2203430.Name: Legendary Beast
2203430.Desc: Casting Wildcall summons a Legendary Companion based on current Photon Energy

2203431.Name: Legendary Beast - Boar
2203431.Desc: Photon Energy above 50%, summons a Boar

2203432.Name: Legendary Beast - Eagle
2203432.Desc: Photon Energy below 50%, summons a Eagle

2203440.Name: Lumi Torrent
2203440.Desc: While in Photon Reforge, Torrent Volley continously charges. After 30s, Torrent Volley evoles into Lumi Torrent

2203441.Name: Lumi Torrent
2203441.Desc:
Torrent Volley has evolved into Lumi Torrent.
Ready to fire a giant arrow at the target

2203450.Name: Wild Call CD
2203450.Desc: For each Lightseeker Arrow fired, reduces the remaining CD of Wildcall

2203470.Name: Light Chasing Sharp
2203470.Desc: While Photon Reforge is active, reduces Storm Arrow CD by 50%

2203480.Name: Arrow of Light
2203480.Desc: Arerow Rain and Lightseeker Arrow are bound to deal Crit DMG

2203500.Name: Wolf's Bite
2203500.Desc: Wild Wolf deals additionally 30% DMG to targets with current HP less than or equal to 35%

2203510.Name: Stomp
2203510.Desc: Casting Wildcall again within 10s commands all beasts to cast Stomp

2203511.Name: Stomp (Buff Timer)
2203511.Desc: Casting Wildcall again within 10s commands all beasts to cast Stomp

2203520.Name: Steel Beak
2203520.Desc:
When the caster and the Falcon deal Crit DMG, inflicts 1 stack of Steel Beak to the target
Every 10 stacks trigger Lightning Strike up to once every 3s

2203580.Name: Falcon Break
2203580.Desc: The Falcon ignores 20% of the target's Armor, and 40% when dealing Crit DMG

2203600.Name: Celestial Eagle
2203600.Desc: When Focus is active, Radiance Barrage summons 1 Celestial Eagle at the target's location

2203610.Name: Radiant Charge
2203610.Desc: When an arrow from Radiance Rift deals DMG, increases the DMG of the next Blast Shot by 20% up to a max of 100%

2203611.Name: Radiant Charge (Stacks)
2203611.Desc: Increases the DMG of the next Blast Shot by 20% up to a max of 100%

2203620.Name: Light Prism
2203620.Desc: When Lightning Strike hits a target, it triggers Light Prism

2203640.Name: Energy Gathering Power
2203640.Desc:
Powerdraw CD -50%.
When Photon Energy is above 50%, casting Powerdraw counts as Photon Reforge

2203650.Name: Steel Beak Strike
2203650.Desc: When Powerdraw hits a target, it applies 2 stacks of Steel Beak. If it deals Crit DMG, apply 5 stacks

2203660.Name: Steel Beak Gathering
2203660.Desc: When Celestial Eagle hits a target, it prevents the target's Steel Beak from naturally decaying

2203530.Name: Phantom Falcon
2203530.Desc: Triggering Implosion 5 times summons a Phantom Falcon to charge at the target

2203540.Name: Focused Concentration (Talent)
2203540.Desc: Throughout the duration of Focus, gain Crit and Crit DMG

2203550.Name: Dual Arrow Mastery
2203550.Desc: When a Special Attack deals Crit DMG, reduces the remaining CD of Blast Shot and Powerdraw by 1 second

2203560.Name: Sharp Double Arrow I
2203560.Desc: Increases the Crit DMG of Double Arrow and Quadraflare by 15%

2203570.Name: Light Energy Stasis
2203570.Desc: When Radiance Barrage hits a target, it applies Light Energy Stasis to them

2203572.Name: Photon Stagnation
2203572.Desc: Next Powerdraw that hits will deal Crit DMG

2203590.Name: Eagle Eye
2203590.Desc: When Photon Energy is above 50%, casting Radiance Barrage counts as Photon Reforge

2203630.Name: Lightning Strike (Talent)
2203630.Desc: Increases Falcon's Lightning Strike DMG by 30%

2203670.Name: Chain Explosion
2203670.Desc: When Blast Shot explodes, inflicts 10 stacks of Steel Beak to all targets hit

2206040.Name: Ring of Judgment
2206040.Desc: Casting Judgment generates a Divine Circle.

2206060.Name: Haste Sigil
2206060.Desc: Haste increases the recovery speed of Holy Sigil.

2207010.Name: Passion Surge
2207010.Desc:
When Melody is active, there is a chance per second to gain Passion Surge.
Passion Surge: Special Attack costs zero Performance Passion for 10s. Ends after Special Attack cast

2207011.Name: Passion Surge (Talent)
2207011.Desc: Activated the Passion Surge talent proc chance

2207012.Name: Special Attack No Consume - Center Stage
2207012.Desc: Special Attacks do not consume Performance Passion from Center Stage

2207030.Name: Heat Surge
2207030.Desc: When Melody is activated, the trigger chance for Passion Surge +3% every second up to 30%

2207050.Name: Arcane Ascension
2207050.Desc: Special Attack costs 1 less Performance Passion

2207060.Name: Melody: Heat Core
2207060.Desc: Melody heals ally targets below 50% HP with 100% bonus effect

2207070.Name: Flame Pursuit
2207070.Desc: After using 3 Special Attacks, the next Basic Attack hit triggers Flame Pillar Blast

2207071.Name: Flame Pillar Blast Ready
2207071.Desc: The next Basic Attack hit triggers Flame Pillar Blast

2207080.Name: Flame Pursuit II
2207080.Desc: Flame Pillar Blast becomes a two-hit combo

2207090.Name: Dissonance Spec
2207090.Desc: While in Rhapsody of Flame, increases all Luck Chance acquired by any means by 50% and increases Resistance by 25%

2207100.Name: Lucky Soundwave
2207100.Desc: Gains 1 Soundwave Energy whenever Expertise Skills or Amplified Beat trigger a Lucky Strike

2207110.Name: Trio Rhapsody
2207110.Desc: Rhapsody of Flame always appears in its most powerful form. While in Rhapsody of Flame, healing +20%

2207120.Name: Severed Chapter
2207120.Desc:
Increases Resilience Break Efficiency of self and Allies by 10%.
After activating Heroic Melody, you and Allies have a Resilience Break Efficiency +30% and deal 15% more DMG to Broken targets

2207121.Name: Severed Chapter - Break Boost
2207121.Desc: Increases Resilience Break Efficiency of self and Allies by 10%

2207122.Name: Severed Chapter - Break Boost (Active)
2207122.Desc: You and Allies have a Resilience Break Efficiency +30% and deal 15% more DMG to Broken targets

2207130.Name: Sound Blaze
2207130.Desc:
Gains 1 Soundwave Energy each time you deal DMG equal to 10 times ATK.
Skills consuming Performance Pasion trigger Scorching Impact when dealing DMG consuming all Soundwave Energy

2207131.Name: Soundwave Energy
2207131.Desc: Skills consuming Performance Passion trigger Scorching Impact when dealing DMG consuming all Soundwave Energy

2207132.Name: Soundwave Count Damage Increase
2207132.Desc: Each 1 Soundwave Energy increases Scorching Impact DMG by 10%

2207140.Name: Healing Note (Talent)
2207140.Desc:
Basic Attack deals an extra instance of DMG.
For every 5 Soundwave Energy obtained, creates a Note for the ally with the lowest HP

2207141.Name: Note (Healing Note)
2207141.Desc: Restores HP equal to 3% ATK in total within 10s. When a Note is granted again, it immediately triggers the remaining healing of the previous Note

2207150.Name: Blazing Heal (Talent)
2207150.Desc: Stores excess Healing (up to 500% of Max HP). After activating Heroic Melody, consumes stored Healing to recover allies' HP every 1s up to 15% of Max HP per second

2207151.Name: Blazing Heal (Heal)
2207151.Desc: After activating Heroic Melody, consumes stored Healing to recover allies' HP every 1s up to 15% of Max HP per second

2207170.Name: Restart (Talent)
2207170.Desc: When Harmonic Anthem or Fierce Strike triggers a Lucky Strike, resets Rhapsody of Flame's CD and allows it to not consume Performance Passion

2207171.Name: Restart
2207171.Desc: Reset Rhapsody of Flame's CD and allows it to not consume Performance Passion for next cast within 10s

2207180.Name: Concerto Spec
2207180.Desc:
Replaces Special Attack with Healing Beat.
While Healing Melody is active, reduces the remaining CD of Fivefold Crescendo and Passion Burst by 1s per second

2207190.Name: Brilliant Charge
2207190.Desc: When Healing Beat or Passion Burst applies Crit Healing or deals Crit DMG, gains 1 Performance Passion

2207181.Name: Healing Melody CD Reduction Buff
2207181.Desc: While Healing Melody is active, reduces the remaining CD of Fivefold Crescendo and Passion Burst by 1s per second

2207200.Name: Double Recovery Note
2207200.Desc: Healing Beat provides an additional equal Healing to targets under the influence of Healing Melody

2207220.Name: Fiery Beat
2207220.Desc:
Healing Beat Crit Rate +10%
Healing Beat Healing +10%

2207230.Name: Critical Encore
2207230.Desc: Every 1% Crit Rate grants 1% trigger chance for Encore Strings

2207240.Name: Passion Fury (Talent)
2207240.Desc: For each 10 Performance Passion consumed, enhances Passion Burst to Passion Fury for 10s

2207241.Name: Passion Fury
2207241.Desc: Passion Burst enhanced into Passion Fury for 10s

2207243.Name: Passion Fury Counter
2207243.Desc: For each 10 Performance Passion consumed, enhances Passion Burst to Passion Fury for 10s

2207250.Name: Stat Resonance (Talent)
2207250.Desc: While Healing Melody is active, grants allies appropriate buffs (Strength, Intellect, Agility) equal to 8% of Intellect

2207251.Name: Stat Resonance (Get Primary Attribute)
2207251.Desc: Determines primary attribute (Strength, Intellect, Agility) of target

2207252.Name: Stat Resonance (Boost Primary Attribute)
2207252.Desc: Boosts primary attribute (Strength, Intellect, Agility) of target

2207260.Name: Stat Resonance Crit (Talent)
2207260.Desc: For 10s after using Passion Burst or Passion Fury, doubles the buffs that Healing Melody provides to allies

2207261.Name: Stat Resonance Crit
2207261.Desc: Doubles the Primary Attribute buffs that Healing Melody provides to allies

2207270.Name: Fire Day
2207270.Desc: Increases Fire Bonus by 8% when attacking Elite or higher targets

2207280.Name: Critical Acclaim
2207280.Desc: During Center Stage, triggering Encore Strings has a 30% chance to grant Passion Surge

2207290.Name: Rhythm Spirit
2207290.Desc: Defeating an enemy has a fixed 50% chance to grant you 1 Performance Passion

2207301.Name: Performance Passion Restore (Infinite Rhapsody)
2207301.Desc: Doubles the Performance PAssion cap and fully restores Performance Passion

2207320.Name: Encore Chain
2207320.Desc:
When Encore Strings triggers, it activates a second time on the same target.
Lucky Strike Chance is reduced by 20%

2207330.Name: Heat Boost
2207330.Desc: When Intellect reaches 500, Performance Energy cap +20%

2207340.Name: Variation
2207340.Desc: Increase Max HP by 20%. Concerto Spec replaces Basic Attack with Resonant Strings

2207350.Name: Melody Chord
2207350.Desc: Melody Healing +20%. Each 1% Hate increases Regen Speed of Performance Passion by 1%

2207370.Name: Indomitable Chord (Talent)
2207370.Desc: While Heroic Melody is active, grants Super Armor, increases Resistance by 25%, and boosts movement speed by 10%

2207371.Name: Indomitable Chord (Buff)
2207371.Desc: Grants Super Armor, increases Resistance by 25%, and boosts movement speed by 10%

2207380.Name: Swing Reflux
2207380.Desc:
Hitting a target with Fierce Strike recovers 5 Performance Energy.
Each additional target hit provides 1 extra Performance Energy up to 10 total

2207390.Name: Luck Multiplier
2207390.Desc: Every 1% Luck grants 0.5% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier. After activating Heroic Melody, doubles its conversion efficiency

2207400.Name: Resonant Counterpoint
2207400.Desc: When a Note forms, there's a 50% chance to create an extra Note for a different target

2207420.Name: Sonic Therapy
2207420.Desc: Converted healing from DMG +20% for targets affected by Note

2207410.Name: Sonic Cure
2207410.Desc: When Expertise deal DMG, additionally heal targets with Note

2207430.Name: Flame's Rampage
2207430.Desc:
When Heroic Melody is active, Rhapsody of Flame will erupt, dealing Magic Damage equal to 50% ATK every 3s to targets it touches.
While in Rhapsody of Flame, each hit of Harmonic Anthem also heals 1 ally with lowest HP for 30% DMG dealt

2207431.Name: Flame's Rampage DMG
2207431.Desc: When Heroic Melody is active, Rhapsody of Flame will erupt, dealing Magic Damage equal to 50% ATK every 3s to targets it touches.

2207450.Name: Finale Command
2207450.Desc: Within 10s of casting Encore, each use of Rhapsody of Flame causes targets affected by Encore to trigger Encore Strings

2207460.Name: Encore Persistence
2207460.Desc:
Permanently benefits from Encore effect.
For every 5 triggers of Encore Strings, the next Amplified Beat and Harmonic Anthem deal 50% more DMG

2207470.Name: Encore Luck Boost
2207470.Desc: Every 1% Luck Chance grants 1% trigger chance for Encore Strings

2207480.Name: Encore Sharp Strike
2207480.Desc:
Triggering Encore Strings to deal DMG or healing grants 2 Performance Energy.
If the Encore Strings triggers Lucky Strike, grants 3 extra Performance Energy

2207490.Name: Absolute Center Stage
2207490.Desc: After you use Center Stage, the next of enhanced skills increases from 1 to 2

2207500.Name: Center Stage: Mad Tune
2207500.Desc: Each Performance Passion consumed reduces the CD of Center Stage by 1s

2207510.Name: Tower Multiwave
2207510.Desc: Casting Center Stage immediately extends Heroic Melody by 5s

2207520.Name: Soundwave Overclock
2207520.Desc: Upon casting Center Stage, grants 15 Soundwave Energy, and doubles all the Soundwave Energy gained in the next 10s

2207530.Name: Crit Charge Rhythm
2207530.Desc:
Fivefold Crescendo deals Crit DMG or healing, grants 2 Performance Energy.
When Healing Melody lands a Crit Hit, grants 1 Performance Energy

2207540.Name: Tower Flame Blast
2207540.Desc: The speaker releases a Flame Shock every 5s

2207550.Name: Multi-Target Heat Amp
2207550.Desc: Passion Burst and Passion Fury deal 5% more DMG per additional target hit, up to 25%

2207560.Name: Heated Tower Flame Blast
2207560.Desc: When Passion Burst or Passion Fury hit the Speaker, it immediately releases a Flame Shock

2207570.Name: Sonic Verdict
2207570.Desc:
While Healing Melody is active, Fivefold Crescendo also deals DMG, with its total DMG scaling equal to its healing multiplier.
While Healing Melody is active, reduces the caster's DMG taken by 15%

2207580.Name: Harmonic Amplifier
2207580.Desc: Increases the DMG dealt and healing of skills triggered by the speaker by 30%

2207590.Name: Crescendo Healing Chord (Talent)
2207590.Desc: For every second Healing Melody remains active, enhances its Healing by 7%, stacking up to 5 times

2207591.Name: Crescendo Healing Chord
2207591.Desc: For every second Healing Melody remains active, enhances its Healing by 7%, stacking up to 5 times

2207600.Name: Crit Scale
2207600.Desc:
Increases Crit Rate by 10% against enemies above 50% HP.
Increases Crit Rate by 10% against enemies below 50% HP

2207610.Name: Symphonic Aria
2207610.Desc: Enhances Healing by 10% for targets affected by Healing Melody

2207620.Name: Vitality Unleash
2207620.Desc:
7% of DMG dealt and 15% of healing done is stored as Rhythm.
Within 10s after casting Center Stage, the use of Expertise and Healing Beat consumes Rhythm to grant up to 40% bonus healing

2207630.Name: Encore Chain (2)
2207630.Desc: Within 10s after you cast Encore, each use of Expertise Skill triggers Encore Strings for targets affected by Encore

2207640.Name: Tower Resonance
2207640.Desc:
Permanently benefits from Encore effect.
Each trigger of Encore Strings reduces the remaining CD of Expertise by 1s

2207650.Name: Stat Resonance Overload
2207650.Desc: For 15s after actively casting Encore, the stat bonuses provided by Healing Melody are +100%

2207660.Name: Center Stage: Concerto
2207660.Desc: The charges of Center Stage increase by 1

2207680.Name: Spiral Flame (Talent)
2207680.Desc: After casting Center Stage, summon a wave of Sonic Surge

2207681.Name: Sonic Surge (Spiral Flame)
2207681.Desc: After casting Center Stage, summon a wave of Sonic Surge, restoring HP over time

3056071.Name: Verdant Oracle X7
3056071.Desc: Within 10s after casting Fast Growth or Nature Ward, increase MATK

3056081.Name: Verdant Oracle X8
3056081.Desc: Casting Blossom Charge grants Super Armor. Blossom Charge Dream DMG increased and Control Duration increased

3059061.Name: Stasis X6
3059061.Desc: If no damage is taken for a few seconds, Max HP increased for the next fe seconds, allowing stacking

3059221.Name: Verdant Oracle Stasis X1
3059221.Desc: Excess healing received is converted into a Shield
